from pathlib import Path

p = Path("/mnt/data/file-CS8neopGmgnrme3ZRabeGr-text_to_analyse.txt")
text = p.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
len(text)

indices = [m.start() for m in re.finditer("﴿", text)]
indices, len(indices)

for i in indices:
    print(i, text[i-30:i+60])

closing = [text.find("﴾", idx) for idx in indices]
list(zip(indices, closing))

for i, j in zip(indices, closing):
    print(i, j)
    print(text[i+1:j])
    print("---")

def trim_span(s):
    # remove leading/trailing whitespace and specified punctuation
    to_strip = " \n\r\t" + "«»'\"()[]{}<>،؛:.,!؟…ـ"
    # remove leading
    start = 0
    end = len(s)
    while start < end and s[start] in to_strip:
        start += 1
    while end > start and s[end-1] in to_strip:
        end -= 1
    return s[start:end]

spans = []
for idx in indices:
    j = text.find("﴾", idx)
    if j == -1:
        continue
    inner = text[idx+1:j]
    inner_trim = trim_span(inner)
    # count Arabic letters? We'll approximate by length
    if len(inner_trim) < 5:
        pass
    # Determine if it's one of known ayah texts
    spans.append((idx, j, inner_trim))
spans

                    (3526,3568,'كَلَّا لَوْ تَعْلَمُونَ عِلْمَ الْيَقِينِ'),
